rules: Read MVP.md if present; treat it as the source of truth.
Prefer verified relation paths over semantic similarity.
Use exact source spans from CodeGraph.
Use codegraph-mcp trace append for shell_command, file_edit, test_run, context_pack_used, and run_end events.

hooks.purpose: Detect CodeGraph index and add a compact context reminder.
Classify prompt mode and select the appropriate CodeGraph tool.
Warn before risky destructive commands, broad edits without context, or secret exposure.
Update changed files after edits and record failing test traces after shell commands.
Record task, retrieved paths, edited files, tests, pass/fail status, trace metrics, and replay validation.
